title: Viennese Journey
description: Viennese journey is a modpack made for the unfrendliest people in the world! (viennese)
body:
# Viennese Journey
## 🌸 Overview

🌸 **Viennese Journey** 🌸 is a **lightweight**, **cozy** modpack designed for those who love **building**, **exploring**, and **spending time with friends**. It focuses on **quality-of-life improvements** and **atmospheric ambience**, creating a **warm and inviting environment** perfect for collaborative projects or simply relaxing gameplay sessions.

Whether you’re building your dream house, decorating villages, or just hanging out, this pack provides the perfect backdrop for creativity without overwhelming you with complexity.

## ⚙️ Requirements

Minecraft Java 1.20.1

**At least 4GB RAM allocated** (recommended: 8GB for smoother play)

_A love for cozy vibes ✨ :)_

## 💖 Credits

This modpack wouldn’t be possible without the amazing work of the modding community. Full credit goes to all the mod authors and tool creators who make the Minecraft experience richer, cozier, and more fun.
